art_market.global_sales_outlook: 2025 growth to $59.6 billion (+4%); market showing cautious resilience with strong focus on blue-chip and high-end segments.
art_market.key_trends: Asia-centric growth continues; Hong Kong solidifying hub status; emphasis on tech-driven debuts ('Zero 10' sector) at upcoming fairs.
art_market.recent_events: Hong Kong Art Week in full swing (March 21-29); Art Basel Hong Kong preview days (March 25-26) and main event (March 27-29) approaching; high dealer optimism in Asia.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Cautious; market participants assessing geopolitical de-escalation impacts; volatility remains a central theme amid global economic monitoring.
stock_market.key_factors: Ongoing US-Iran geopolitical situation; focus shifting to potential impacts on oil prices and incoming Q1 earnings clarity.
